title: DesignOutput
description: Structured return from a Stage 6 designer agent (architecture-designer, architecture-improver, ui-ux-designer, or product-designer).

designer.description: Which Stage 6 designer produced the output.

docs.description: One or more design documents written to the spec directory.

modules.description: Module/component names declared by the design (for downstream spec-writer reference).

has_numeric_constants.description: True if the design declares numeric constants (thresholds/ratios/sizes) that Stage 6.5 prototype-runner should validate empirically.
